description: Photograph of three people in a lush outdoor coffee plantation or similar tropical crop field. A man in a black cap and black shirt on the left points toward the plants on the right. A woman in a white cap and beige clothing stands in the center looking toward him, and another woman in a beige hat and light pink shirt stands on the right gesturing toward the coffee shrubs. Green foliage fills the foreground and background; red coffee cherries are visible on the right. Natural daylight, no visible text overlays.

Line/area chart titled 'Nestlé GHG emissions*, GHG removals and % net reduction vs. 2018 baseline (million tonnes of CO2e)'. X-axis years 2018-2023; y-axis roughly 50-100. Shows 2018 baseline 91.17, a peak around 2020, then decline to 79.55 GHG emissions in 2023, with 78.79 net GHG emissions after 0.76 removals and 13.58% net GHG emissions reduction vs. 2018 baseline. Includes annotation 'Net Zero Roadmap launched' at 2020 and footnotes about scopes and baseline restatement.

Donut chart titled '2023 absolute CO2e reductions and removals from our interventions (million tonnes)'. Center value 13.29 million tonnes. Segments labeled Responsible Sourcing 28%, Sourcing – Dairy & Livestock 25%, Manufacturing 15%, Sourcing – Soil & Forest 9%, Packaging 7%, Logistics 4%, Recipe reformulation 6%, and Removals 6%.

Vertical SDG icon panel with standard colored tiles for SDG 7 Affordable and Clean Energy, SDG 11 Sustainable Cities and Communities, SDG 13 Climate Action, SDG 14 Life Below Water, and SDG 15 Life on Land.
